title: add breaksop feature
body:
SOP-style logic with multiple outputs can be hard to reason about when debugging or dealing with mapping/optimization downstream flows. breaksop breaks apart this logic into simpler pieces. 

Adds a new breaksop techmap pass that rewrites multi-output SOP structures into simpler, equivalent logic. The pass is implemented in passes/techmap/breaksop.cc and registered via the techmap Makefile.

Adds a .ys test that runs breaksop on single and multiple SOP cases and checks that the rewritten netlist matches the expected structure.
